title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Key Exchange
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Dadan, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 14–17.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Dadan, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Isn't that what you said, ace!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: i would never have thought... To live...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If gold Roger had a kid?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope these are his last words:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, it's not like he exists.

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: oh yeah... when you see DADAN again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haa... Haa... it's not a lie...

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Haa... i can't... TALK for much longer...

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Luffy, what I'm about To Tell You...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm here for White- Beard's Head!!!

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Dadan, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: key exchange.
